hostPaths.purpose: Read an operator-selected Pages build artifact, Pages Functions, and the project's local Wrangler compiler for direct upload.

fields.label: API token
fields.help: In the Cloudflare dashboard, create either a user token under My Profile > API Tokens or an account-owned token under Manage Account > Account API Tokens. Grant Zone Zone Edit, Zone DNS Edit, Cloudflare Tunnel Write, Turnstile Sites Write, and Pages Write permissions for the required account and zones. Create the token, copy the secret shown once, and paste it here.

fields.label: Account ID
fields.help: In the Cloudflare dashboard, open Account home, find the account that owns the zones and tunnels, open the menu at the end of its row, and select Copy account ID. Paste the 32-character ID here.
